chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.35 of 2019 Farrukh Shahzad Choudhry Versus M.C.B. Bank Limited and others along with First Appeal No.49 of 2019 Farrukh Shahzad Choudhry and others Versus M.C.B. Bank Limited and another DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For order on office objection/reply “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.1629/2019 (Stay). 4. For hearing of CMA No.2106/2019 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 27.02.2024 Mr. Muhammad Asghar, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Munir Ahmed Malik, Advocate for Appellants in both appeals. Mr. Bahzad Haider, Advocate for Respondent No.1 in both appeals. Mr. Badar Alam, Advocate for Respondent No.2 in both appeals..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. On the last date of hearing counsel for appellants was put on notice that in case he fails to appear and proceed with the matter, the appeals shall be dismissed for non-prosecution. It does not need any further order, as today again counsel for appellants is not in attendance. Both these appeals are dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
